name: Beef Lo Mein with Bean Sprouts
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fresh Chinese egg noodles (medium width)
1/2 lb Fresh bean sprouts (tails removed, patted dry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add noodles to a large pot of boiling salted water. Stir and bring to a second boil, then reduce to a simmer. Cook for 1 minute longer. Drain thoroughly.
2. Rinse with cold water. Drain again.
3. Cut meat against the grain into 1/4-inch thick slices.
4. Mix beef marinade: Combine 1/2 tbsp Soy sauce, 2 tsp Rice wine or dry sherry, 1/2 tsp Sugar, 1/2 tbsp Cornstarch, and 1 t Sesame oil in a bowl.
5. Add beef strips to the marinade and let stand for 15 minutes.
6. In a medium bowl, mix together oyster sauce, dark soy sauce, light soy sauce, chicken broth, sesame oil, sugar, white pepper.
7. Preheat a wok with 2 tablespoons of peanut oil.
8. Add ginger and garlic; saute until fragrant.
9. Increase heat to high. Add beef; stir-fry until browned (about 2 minutes). Remove and set aside.
10. Heat remaining oil in the wok over medium heat.
11. Add remaining ginger, garlic, and salt.
12. Pour in sauce mixture; stir and bring to a boil.
13. Add noodles and toss to coat with the sauce.
14. Add bean sprouts and chives. Return beef to the wok. Stir-fry.
15. Remove and discard ginger and garlic before serving.
